scripts.dev: pnpm dev:stop && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --kill-signal SIGINT --names frontend,backend --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "pnpm dev:frontend" "pnpm dev:backend"
scripts.dev:frontend: set CI=true&& pnpm --dir frontend dev -- --clearScreen false --strictPort
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && set PYTHONUTF8=1&& set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&& ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -X utf8 run_server.py
